pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add explicit dependency for javax.validation API to resolve potential missing class issues during migration.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for API documentation support in Spring Boot 3.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services in tests.
Update Maven Surefire plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Configure main class property and plugin settings for executable JAR generation.
Restructure pom.xml with comments and sections for better readability and maintenance.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven manually since it is no longer provided by the base image.
Install Node.js using nvm to replace the previous NodeSource setup script.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the application within the Docker image.
Define the specific Java jar execution command to run the application instead of a generic bash shell.
Copy source code and configuration files into the image to enable the build step.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old project README with a new template-based README for a specific team assignment, including updated instructions, version info, and application overview.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README.md content with new template structure

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project identity.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Resolve a merge conflict in .gitignore by selecting the stashed changes which include modern test coverage and storybook log exclusions.
frontend/.gitignore.human_impl: Removed '<<<<<<< Updated upstream' and '>>>>>>> Stashed changes' markers, keeping '/.nyc_output' and 'build-storybook.log' while discarding '/reports'.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore nyc (Istanbul) test coverage output directories to prevent committing generated test data.
Ignore Stryker mutation testing temporary files to keep the repository clean of transient test artifacts.
Ignore Storybook build logs to prevent committing verbose output files.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Convert Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default.
Add JSDoc type annotation for the Storybook configuration object.
Update story file glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs extensions.
Add the onboarding addon to the Storybook configuration.
Add the Chromatic addon for visual testing integration.
Add the interactions addon for interaction testing.
Explicitly define the React Webpack 5 framework in the configuration.
Configure static directories to serve public assets.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.human_impl: Removed webpackFinal function and WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning import

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Implement logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on whether the environment is localhost or GitHub Pages.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: const isLocalhost = currentUrl.startsWith("http://localhost:6006/"); const mockServiceWorkerUrl = isLocalhost ? "mockServiceWorker.js" : "https://" + window.location.hostname + "/mockServiceWorker.js";

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the calculated URL.
Wrap Storybook stories with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object with parameters and loaders.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: const preview = { parameters: { controls: { ... } }, loaders: [mswLoader] }; export default preview;

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Remove unused import for react-bootstrap-table-next CSS.

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Removed leading dot from baseUrl to align with standard jsconfig conventions.
Added include directive to explicitly scope the configuration to the src directory.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Regenerate package-lock.json to use lockfileVersion 3, which is the default for modern npm versions and provides better integrity checks and dependency resolution.
